• Torch7
    • cephesstars45 - Cephes mathematical functions library, wrapped for Torch. Provides and wraps the 180+ special mathematical functions from the Cephes mathematical library, developed by Stephen L. Moshier. It is used, among many other places, at the heart of SciPy. [Deprecated]
    • autogradstars546 - Autograd automatically differentiates native Torch code. Inspired by the original Python version.
    • graphstars36 - Graph package for Torch. [Deprecated]
    • randomkitstars35 - Numpy's randomkit, wrapped for Torch. [Deprecated]
    • signalstars45 - A signal processing toolbox for Torch-7. FFT, DCT, Hilbert, cepstrums, stft.
    • nnstars1.3k - Neural Network package for Torch.
    • torchnetstars994 - framework for torch which provides a set of abstractions aiming at encouraging code re-use as well as encouraging modular programming.
    • nngraphstars297 - This package provides graphical computation for nn library in Torch7.
    • nnxstars96 - A completely unstable and experimental package that extends Torch's builtin nn library.
    • rnnstars931 - A Recurrent Neural Network library that extends Torch's nn. RNNs, LSTMs, GRUs, BRNNs, BLSTMs, etc.
    • dpnnstars193 - Many useful features that aren't part of the main nn package.
    • dpstars346 - A deep learning library designed for streamlining research and development using the Torch7 distribution. It emphasizes flexibility through the elegant use of object-oriented design patterns. [Deprecated]
    • optimstars193 - An optimization library for Torch. SGD, Adagrad, Conjugate-Gradient, LBFGS, RProp and more.
    • unsupstars85 - A package for unsupervised learning in Torch. Provides modules that are compatible with nn (LinearPsd, ConvPsd, AutoEncoder, ...), and self-contained algorithms (k-means, PCA). [Deprecated]
    • manifoldstars133 - A package to manipulate manifolds.
    • svmstars43 - Torch-SVM library. [Deprecated]
    • lbfgsstars2 - FFI Wrapper for liblbfgs. [Deprecated]
    • vowpalwabbitstars2 - An old vowpalwabbit interface to torch. [Deprecated]
    • OpenGMstars8 - OpenGM is a C++ library for graphical modeling, and inference. The Lua bindings provide a simple way of describing graphs, from Lua, and then optimizing them with OpenGM. [Deprecated]
    • spaghettistars2 - Spaghetti (sparse linear) module for torch7 by @MichaelMathieu [Deprecated]
    • LuaSHKitstars3 - A lua wrapper around the Locality sensitive hashing library SHKit [Deprecated]
    • kernel smoothingstars5 - KNN, kernel-weighted average, local linear regression smoothers. [Deprecated]
    • cutorchstars332 - Torch CUDA Implementation.
    • cunnstars209 - Torch CUDA Neural Network Implementation.
    • imgraphstars22 - An image/graph library for Torch. This package provides routines to construct graphs on images, segment them, build trees out of them, and convert them back to images. [Deprecated]
    • videographstars9 - A video/graph library for Torch. This package provides routines to construct graphs on videos, segment them, build trees out of them, and convert them back to videos. [Deprecated]
    • saliencystars6 - code and tools around integral images. A library for finding interest points based on fast integral histograms. [Deprecated]
    • stitchstars4 - allows us to use hugin to stitch images and apply same stitching to a video sequence. [Deprecated]
    • sfmstars3 - A bundle adjustment/structure from motion package. [Deprecated]
    • fexstars10 - A package for feature extraction in Torch. Provides SIFT and dSIFT modules. [Deprecated]
    • OverFeatstars593 - A state-of-the-art generic dense feature extractor. [Deprecated]
    • wav2letterstars6.1k - a simple and efficient end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system from Facebook AI Research.
